about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner in finding the perfect home. We make real estate dreams come true with innovative technology and personalized service.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Founded in 2010, R.E.G Real Estate Group started with a simple mission: to revolutionize the way people find and purchase their dream homes. What began as a small local agency has grown into one of the most trusted names in real estate.
story.p2: Over the years, we've helped thousands of families find their perfect homes, from cozy apartments to luxurious estates. Our commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction has remained unwavering.
story.p3: Today, we combine cutting-edge technology with personalized service to provide an unmatched real estate experience. Our team of experienced professionals is dedicated to making your home buying journey smooth and successful.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide exceptional real estate services that exceed our clients' expectations, making the process of buying, selling, or renting property as seamless and rewarding as possible.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the most trusted and innovative real estate company, transforming how people discover and acquire their dream properties through technology and personalized care.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We strive for excellence in every aspect of our service, from property listings to customer support.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: Building lasting relationships based on honesty, transparency, and reliable service.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Embracing technology and new ideas to provide the best real estate experience.

testimonial.commentMaxLength: Comment must be less than 500 characters
testimonial.agreeTerms: I agree to the terms and conditions
testimonial.agreeRequired: You must agree to the terms and conditions
testimonial.termsDescription: By submitting this testimonial, you agree that we may publish it on our website and marketing materials. All testimonials are subject to review before publication.

testimonial.submissionError: Failed to submit testimonial. Please try again.
testimonial.reviewMessage: Your testimonial has been submitted successfully.

testimonial.approvalStep: Once approved, it will appear on our website
testimonial.featuredStep: Exceptional testimonials may be featured on our homepage
testimonial.redirectMessage: You will be redirected to the homepage in 5 seconds...

testimonial.guideline2: Focus on specific aspects you appreciated
testimonial.guideline4: All testimonials are subject to review
